dbPr.command: select C3.l_long,substr(A.c_val_isin,6,6),A.c_val_isin,B.c_mne,B.l_court,B.l_long,C2.l_court,H.Z_tit,MT_NOM,D.c_id_adc,NOM_etab,E.taux,E.d_joui,E.d_ech_eff, E.f_int,E.Y_REM from tvval A,tvallg B,tmarche,tlib C1,tformj,tlib C2,Tadhere D,TETABLG,TATTVAL E , Tlib C3, tcpttit H,Ttypval I where A.c_val_isin = B.c_val_isin and A.c_gcatval in ( '2','9') and A.d_eff = ( select max(d_eff) from tvval where c_val_isin = A.c_val_isin) and A.c_marche = Tmarche.c_marche and Tmarche.c_l = C1.c_l and A.C_FORM_JUR = tformj.C_FORM_JUR and tformj.c_l = C2.c_l and D.etab_id = A.etab_id_stem and D.c_id_tiers = A.c_id_tiers_stem and D.c_org = '002' and D.c_place = 'CAS' and D.c_pays = 'MA' and tetablg.etab_id = A.etab_id_stem and tetablg.c_id_tiers = A.c_id_tiers_stem and A.c_val_isin = E.c_val_isin and E.d_ech_eff > (select d_date from tdates where NOM_DATE = 'DCPT' ) and A.y_val = I.y_val and I.c_l = c3.c_l and A.c_val_isin = H.c_val_isin and H.c_nat_cpt = '90' and H.z_tit > 0 and H.d_der_maj <= E.d_ech_eff order by 1,2

connection.name: Requête - Requête1
connection.description: Connexion à la requête « Requête1 » dans le classeur.
